_meta.frozen_intent: Sparse explicit labels only; absence of an id here does NOT mean ‘camelid only’ — see defaults.

defaults.clinical_bucket_40_unlisted: Not labeled as transgenic-mouse nanobody in this file; discovery lineages vary (camelid immunization / engineered / etc.).
defaults.database_b_29: SAbDab-nano derived humanized/engineered camelid VHH structures — not mouse nanobody platform.

nanobody_transgenic_mouse_in_vhh69_union.evidence: Aligned with data/reference/VHH68_reference_stats_v1.json platform_policy (Porustobart excluded from camelid n=68 calibration).

verified_in_suite.note_other_mouse_claims: No second VHH id in the 69-row union is tagged mouse nanobody in frozen suite metadata. Add rows here only with owner-approved provenance.

lofacimig.reason: Tandem VH-VH-G1 homodimer (493 aa per chain per NCATS/GSRS); authoritative full chain collected, but no single-domain VHH row is admitted to validated_clinical_39 or VHH42.
